title: a11y set-value: 50ms delay + read-back warning for Win11 RichTextBox and Chrome stale ValuePattern
desc: DoSetValue() now waits 50ms after ValuePattern.SetValue and reads back via ReadElementValue. If empty, logs stale-cache warning. Fixes silent expect/assert failures on Win11 RichEditD2DPT.
steps: ActionExecutor.cs DoSetValue: Thread.Sleep(50) after vp.Pattern.SetValue(text). ReadElementValue() checks Value then TextPattern then Name. If read-back empty and text non-empty: logs stale cache warning. a11y set-value affected command. Win11 Notepad RichEditD2DPT and Chrome input workaround.
If stale warning appears: try type_text instead (uses WM_CHAR/EM_REPLACESEL tiers which bypass UIA cache).
Root cause: Win11 RichEditD2DPT and Chrome accessibility bridge don't sync ValuePattern.Value synchronously after SetValue COM call.
author: claude
